home.metaDescription: Your go-to source for the latest news, in-depth articles, and expert insights on technology, travel, sports, finance, and more.
home.travelSubHeading: Click on the icon to enjoy the music
home.becomeAnAuthorHeading: Become an author and share your great stories
home.becomeAnAuthorDescription: Become an author you can earn extra income by writing articles. Read and share new perspectives on just about any topic. Everyone's welcome.

about.title: About Us
about.aboutSubheading: {siteName} is a platform dedicated to sharing insightful articles, stories, and perspectives. We believe in the power of words to inform, inspire, and connect communities around the world.
about.missionDescription: We strive to create a space where writers and readers come together to explore ideas, share knowledge, and engage in meaningful conversations. Our goal is to make quality content accessible to everyone.
about.qualityContentDescription: Every article is crafted with care, ensuring accuracy and depth on topics that matter.
about.communityDrivenDescription: Our platform empowers writers to share their voice and readers to discover new perspectives.
about.openPlatformDescription: Anyone can contribute, comment, and engage — because great ideas can come from anywhere.
about.growingDescription: Our community is constantly expanding as more writers share their content and readers discover stories that resonate with them.
about.publishedArticlesDescription: Quality posts covering a wide range of topics and categories.
about.contentCategoriesDescription: Organized collections spanning diverse interests and expertise.
about.contributingAuthorsDescription: Talented writers sharing their knowledge and perspectives.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question, suggestion, or want to collaborate? We'd love to hear from you.

newsletter.newsletterDescription: Read and share new perspectives on just about any topic. Everyone's welcome.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: The views, opinions, and content expressed in this article are solely those of the author and do not necessarily reflect the official policy or position of The World Ambassador (TWA). TWA does not assume any responsibility or liability for the accuracy, completeness, or authenticity of the information presented. Under the Prevention of Electronic Crimes Act (PECA), 2016, readers are encouraged to verify facts independently.

authorProfile.hideDialogBody: Are you sure you want to hide {name}? This action will hide all posts from this author.
authorProfile.reportDialogBody: Are you sure you want to report "{name}"? This action will report this author.

legal.privacyIntro: At {siteName}, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website at {siteUrl}.
legal.personalDataIntro: When you register for an account, we may collect personally identifiable information such as:
legal.personalDataItem4: Any other information you voluntarily provide
legal.usageDataDescription: We may automatically collect information about how you access and use the website, including your IP address, browser type, operating system, referring URLs, pages visited, and the dates and times of your visits.
legal.howWeUseIntro: We use the information we collect to:
legal.howWeUseItem1: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
legal.howWeUseItem4: Respond to your comments and questions
legal.howWeUseItem5: Analyze usage patterns to improve user experience
legal.howWeUseItem6: Prevent fraud and enforce our terms
legal.sharingIntro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:
legal.dataSecurityDescription: We use commercially reasonable measures to protect your personal data. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.
legal.yourRightsItem1: Access the personal data we hold about you
legal.yourRightsItem3: Request deletion of your account and personal data
legal.thirdPartyLinksDescription: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those sites.
legal.changesToPolicyDescription: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
legal.contactUsPrivacy: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at {email}.
legal.termsIntro: Welcome to {siteName}. By accessing or using our website at {siteUrl}, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
legal.accountRegistrationIntro: To access certain features, you may need to create an account. You agree to:
legal.accountRegistrationItem1: Provide accurate and complete information during registration
legal.accountRegistrationItem2: Keep your login credentials secure and confidential
legal.accountRegistrationItem3: Accept responsibility for all activity under your account
legal.accountRegistrationItem4: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
legal.accountApprovalNote: New accounts are subject to admin approval before activation.
legal.userContentIntro: You retain ownership of the content you submit (posts, comments, media). By submitting content, you grant {siteName} a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute your content on the platform.
legal.termsContactDescription: For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at {email}.
legal.cookieIntro: This Cookie Policy explains how {siteName} ({siteUrl}) uses cookies and similar technologies to recognise you when you visit our website.
legal.whatAreCookiesDescription: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work efficiently and to provide information to the site owners.
legal.howWeUseCookiesIntro: We use the following types of cookies:
legal.managingCookiesIntro: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to:
legal.cookieContactUs: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at {email}.
legal.sharingItem2Description: trusted third-party services that help operate our website (e.g., hosting, analytics)
legal.sharingItem3Description: if required by law, court order, or governmental regulation
legal.userContentProhibited: You agree not to post content that:
legal.userContentProhibitedItem1: Is unlawful, harmful, threatening, abusive, or harassing
legal.userContentProhibitedItem2: Infringes on copyrights, trademarks, or other intellectual property rights
legal.userContentProhibitedItem3: Contains viruses, malware, or other harmful code
legal.userContentProhibitedItem4: Is spam, unsolicited advertising, or promotional material
legal.acceptableUseItem1: Use the service for any illegal purpose
legal.acceptableUseItem2: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the system
legal.acceptableUseItem3: Interfere with the proper functioning of the service
legal.acceptableUseItem4: Scrape, crawl, or collect data without our written consent
legal.acceptableUseItem5: Create multiple accounts to circumvent restrictions
legal.intellectualPropertyDescription: The {siteName} name, logo, website design, and original content are the property of {siteName} and are protected by copyright and intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our written permission.
legal.terminationDescription: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time, with or without cause, and with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the service ceases immediately.
legal.disclaimerDescription: The service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free.
legal.limitationLiabilityDescription: To the maximum extent permitted by law, {siteName} shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
legal.changesToTermsDescription: We may modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
legal.essentialCookiesIntro: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They include:
legal.essentialCookieItem1Description: to keep you logged in during your session
legal.analyticsCookiesDescription: We may use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our website. These cookies help us measure traffic, identify popular pages, and improve the user experience.
legal.preferenceCookiesDescription: These cookies remember your preferences (such as dark mode or language settings) to personalise your experience.
legal.managingCookieItem1: View what cookies are stored and delete them individually
legal.managingCookieItem5: Delete all cookies when you close the browser
legal.managingCookiesNote: Please note that blocking essential cookies may prevent you from using certain features of the website, such as logging in.
legal.thirdPartyCookiesDescription: We may use third-party services (such as analytics providers) that set their own cookies. We do not control those cookies. Please refer to the respective third-party privacy policies for information on their cookies.
legal.changesToCookiePolicyDescription: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
legal.privacySubtitle: We are committed to protecting your personal information and being transparent about how {siteName} collects and uses data.
legal.privacyCookiesAndTrackingDescription: We use cookies, web beacons, and similar tracking technologies to collect usage data and improve the performance of our website. For detailed information, please refer to our Cookie Policy.
legal.privacyLegalBasisIntro: We process your personal data on the following legal bases:
legal.privacyLegalBasis1Description: You have given clear consent for us to process your personal data for a specific purpose
legal.privacyLegalBasis2Description: Processing is necessary for the performance of a contract with you (e.g., providing your account)
legal.privacyLegalBasis3Description: Processing is necessary for our legitimate interests, such as improving our services and preventing fraud
legal.privacyLegalBasis4Description: Processing is necessary to comply with a legal obligation
legal.privacyDataRetentionDescription: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, including to satisfy any legal, accounting, or reporting requirements. Account data is retained while your account is active and for a reasonable period afterwards in case you decide to reactivate. You may request deletion of your account and data at any time.
legal.privacyInternationalTransfersDescription: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than the country in which you reside. These countries may have data-protection laws that differ from those in your country. We take appropriate safeguards to ensure that your personal data remains protected in accordance with this Privacy Policy.
legal.privacyRightsItem5: Object to the processing of your personal data
legal.privacyRightsItem6: Request data portability — receive your data in a structured, commonly used format
legal.privacyRightsExercise: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at {email}. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
legal.privacyChildrensPrivacyDescription: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that a child under 13 has provided us with personal data, we will take steps to delete such information promptly.
legal.termsSubtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using {siteName}. By accessing the site, you agree to be bound by these terms.
legal.termsPrivacyLinkDescription: Your use of {siteName} is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which describes how we collect, use, and share your personal information. By using our services, you consent to the practices described in the Privacy Policy.
legal.termsIndemnificationDescription: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless {siteName}, its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or in connection with your use of the service or your violation of these Terms.
legal.termsGoverningLawDescription: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Pakistan, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Pakistan.
legal.termsSeverabilityDescription: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue to be valid and enforceable. The invalid or unenforceable provision shall be deemed modified so that it is valid and enforceable to the maximum extent permitted by law.
legal.cookieSubtitle: Learn how {siteName} uses cookies and how you can manage your preferences.
legal.cookieAdvertisingCookiesDescription: We may use advertising cookies to display relevant ads to you based on your browsing behaviour. These cookies track your visits to our website and other sites. You can opt out of personalised advertising through your browser settings.
legal.cookieLocalePurpose: Language preference — remembers your chosen language
legal.cookieThemePurpose: Theme preference — remembers your dark/light mode choice
legal.cookieConsentInfoDescription: By continuing to use our website, you consent to the use of cookies as described in this policy. You can withdraw your consent at any time by adjusting your browser settings or contacting us.
legal.aiPolicySubtitle: How {siteName} approaches the responsible use of artificial intelligence in journalism and content creation.
legal.aiPolicyIntro: At {siteName}, we believe in harnessing the power of artificial intelligence while maintaining the highest standards of journalistic integrity, accuracy, and transparency. This policy outlines how we use AI tools and what our authors and readers can expect.
legal.aiCommitmentDescription: {siteName} is committed to the responsible and ethical use of AI across our platform. We adhere to the following principles:
legal.aiCommitmentItem1: Human oversight — AI is a tool that assists, never replaces, human editorial judgment
legal.aiCommitmentItem2: Transparency — We disclose when AI tools have been used in content creation
legal.aiCommitmentItem3: Accuracy — All AI-assisted content is fact-checked by human editors before publication
legal.aiCommitmentItem4: Fairness — We actively work to identify and mitigate bias in AI-generated outputs
legal.aiContentGuidelinesIntro: {siteName} permits the use of AI as a supplementary tool for content creation, subject to the following guidelines:
legal.aiPermittedUsesIntro: Authors may use AI tools for:
legal.aiPermittedUse1Description: Summarising background information, identifying sources, and gathering data points
legal.aiPermittedUse2Description: Grammar checking, spell-checking, and improving clarity of human-written text
legal.aiPermittedUse3Description: Assisting with multilingual content, subject to human review for accuracy
legal.aiPermittedUse4Description: Processing datasets to identify trends and generate visualisations
legal.aiProhibitedUsesIntro: The following uses of AI are strictly prohibited on our platform:
legal.aiProhibitedUse1: Publishing fully AI-generated articles without substantial human editing and fact-checking
legal.aiProhibitedUse2: Using AI to fabricate quotes, sources, interviews, or events that did not occur
legal.aiProhibitedUse3: Generating misleading or deceptive content designed to manipulate public opinion
legal.aiProhibitedUse4: Creating deepfake images, audio, or video and presenting them as authentic media
legal.aiProhibitedUse5: Using AI to plagiarise or closely replicate another author's unique voice or original content
legal.aiDisclosureDescription: Transparency is central to our editorial standards. {siteName} requires the following disclosures:
legal.aiDisclosureItem1: Articles with substantial AI-generated content must include a clear disclosure label indicating AI assistance
legal.aiDisclosureItem2: AI-generated images or illustrations must be clearly labelled as such
legal.aiDisclosureItem3: Authors must declare the use of AI tools during the editorial review process
legal.aiEditorialOversightDescription: All content published on {siteName} — whether AI-assisted or entirely human-written — undergoes the same rigorous editorial review process. Our editors verify facts, check sources, ensure balanced reporting, and maintain our quality standards regardless of how the initial draft was produced.
legal.aiDataPrivacyDescription: {siteName} takes your privacy seriously in all AI-related activities:
legal.aiDataPrivacyItem1: We do not use personal user data to train AI models without explicit consent
legal.aiDataPrivacyItem2: Reader behaviour data used for content recommendations is anonymised and aggregated
legal.aiDataPrivacyItem3: We do not share personal data with third-party AI service providers beyond what is necessary for the service to function
legal.aiIntellectualPropertyDescription: Content created with AI assistance on our platform is subject to the same intellectual property rules as any other content. Authors retain ownership of their work, but must ensure that AI-assisted content does not infringe upon the intellectual property rights of others. We reserve the right to remove content that violates these standards.
legal.aiAccountabilityDescription: {siteName} maintains ultimate responsibility for all content published on the platform, regardless of whether AI tools were used in its creation. Our editorial team regularly reviews AI-related practices and updates our guidelines as the technology evolves.
legal.aiPolicyUpdatesDescription: As AI technology continues to evolve rapidly, we will update this policy periodically to reflect new developments, industry best practices, and regulatory changes. All updates will be communicated through this page with an updated effective date.
legal.aiContactDescription: If you have questions, concerns, or feedback about our AI practices, please contact us at {email}. We welcome dialogue on how we can improve our approach to responsible AI.
